zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Neville於大約1366年出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，他的父親John Neville30歲，母親Maud de Percy33歲。他於1392年之前與Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1406年3月14日在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Neville于大约1366年出生在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素时，他的父亲John Neville30岁，母亲Maud de Percy33岁。他于1392年之前与Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1406年3月14日在英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Neville was born about 1366, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, his father, John Neville, was 30 and his mother, Maud de Percy, was 33. He married Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival before 1392. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 14 March 1406, in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Neville est né environ 1366, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, John Neville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud de Percy, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival avant 1392. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 mars 1406, à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

Er hat vor 1392 Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. März 1406 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

Ele casou-se com Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival antes 1392. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de março de 1406, em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Neville родился около 1366 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени John Neville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Percy, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Furnival, Baroness Furnival перед 1392 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 14 марта 1406 г. в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.
